name: Herb Abramson
abstract: Herbert Charles Abramson (November 16, 1916 – November 9, 1999) was an American record executive, record producer, and co-founder of Atlantic Records.

about_quotes.speaker: David Albert Francis
about_quotes.evidence: I started out with Atlantic Records... The company was owned at that time by Herb Abramson... I started recording with Atlantic

about_quotes.speaker: Tiny Grimes
about_quotes.evidence: He came in town because Herb was with National Records and he got him because he knew -- Herb Abrams knows recording backwards.
